subcodes.first_line: O God, my God! Thou seest Thy devoted servants athirst of the cup of mighty martyrdom in Thy path, hastening to the field of sacrifice.
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی تری عبادک المخلصین متعطشون لکاس الشهاده الکبری فی سبیلک و یسرعون
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for martyrs, @martyrs and martyrdom, @eulogies; reminiscences, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
